reviews.review_description: This app made me feel so happy, and I found myself dancing around, waving my controller in the air like I just don't care! Really fun and positive. I'd certainly pay $ for more of these in the future. So, please get crackin'! And thanks!
If you love Tyler Hurds work, you’ll probably like this too. It’s free so nothing to lose..
I noticed some frame drop but pretty good experience in general! Worth trying!
I love it! Please, more music, more worlds and I will pay for it  without thinking twice. Well done devs, great job!
Love all the colors. Great vibe.
Would gladly pay for a full album.. or a mix would be amazing!
I highly recommend you guys make some more apps like this. ���

I must say, I’m really enjoying these music videos created for VR. Like I said in an earlier review of Show It 2 Me, another VR video promoting a single, the idea of VR being a new modern-day MTV is an inspired one. If the idea is to create a visual expression to elevate the music to memorable heights, then count The Coast as another qualified success. Although the songs themselves are certainly not unenjoyable, they are somewhat overshadowed by the visual presentation. That is certainly not necessarily a bad thing, and for artists just trying to make it in the industry, that is probably the point. Having said that, in both cases the graphics and art style are perfectly suited to the music’s tone. In the case of The Coast, we have a “get up and move” groover that will have you bobbing your head and will put a smile on your face. The experience is undeniably catchy, with positive vibes galore. Without giving too much away, you will be transported to a world only described as the happiest place in your imagination. It’s one of those multi sensory experiences you will want to revisit numerous times. I only deduct one star because I’m reserving five stars for the iconic VR video that I know is either out there or is yet to be made. Even so, for the cost of nothing, this is one you simply can’t pass up.

Such a great free experience, better than some paid experiences I got myself. If only it were longer. I hope there will be a "sequel".
Also like another reviewer said, lucy and mary are your friends.

An immersive journey to a special place that is bursting with excitement. 
The visuals are absolutely stunning, words cannot describe the amazing feeling you have travelling through this warm interactive environment.
****** 6 STARS you will not be disappointed!
